name: @kutana/openclaw-plugin
description: Kutana AI meeting tools for OpenClaw agents

tools.name: kutana_list_meetings
tools.description: List available Kutana AI meetings

tools.name: kutana_join_meeting
tools.description: Join a Kutana AI meeting by ID with optional capability declaration

capabilities.description: Agent capabilities: text_only (default), voice_in, voice_out, voice_bidirectional, tts_enabled

tts_voice_id.description: TTS voice ID override (used with tts_enabled capability)

tools.name: kutana_get_transcript
tools.description: Get recent transcript segments from the current meeting

last_n.description: Number of recent segments to return (default: 50)

tools.name: kutana_create_task
tools.description: Create a task/action item from a meeting

tools.name: kutana_get_participants
tools.description: List participants in the current meeting

tools.name: kutana_create_meeting
tools.description: Create a new Kutana AI meeting

tools.name: kutana_leave_meeting
tools.description: Leave the current meeting

tools.name: kutana_raise_hand
tools.description: Request to speak in the meeting

topic.description: Optional topic for what you want to discuss

tools.name: kutana_cancel_hand_raise
tools.description: Withdraw from the speaker queue

tools.name: kutana_get_queue_status
tools.description: Check the current speaker queue and your position

tools.name: kutana_start_speaking
tools.description: Confirm you are starting to speak (after your turn arrives)

tools.name: kutana_mark_finished_speaking
tools.description: Signal you are done speaking, advance the queue

tools.name: kutana_speak
tools.description: Speak text in the meeting (handles turn management and TTS automatically)

tools.name: kutana_send_chat_message
tools.description: Send a chat message to the meeting

message_type.description: Message type: text, question, action_item, or decision

tools.name: kutana_get_chat_messages
tools.description: Get chat messages from the meeting

limit.description: Number of messages to return (default: 50, max: 200)

message_type.description: Filter by message type: text, question, action_item, decision

since.description: ISO 8601 datetime — only return messages after this time

tools.name: kutana_get_meeting_status
tools.description: Get comprehensive meeting state (participants, queue, active speaker, recent chat)

tools.name: kutana_get_speaking_status
tools.description: Check if you are currently the active speaker

tools.name: kutana_get_tasks
tools.description: Get tasks for a specific meeting

tools.name: kutana_get_summary
tools.description: Get a structured summary for a meeting (title, decisions, key points, action items)

tools.name: kutana_set_context
tools.description: Inject context into a meeting for participants to see (agenda, notes, linked docs)

tools.name: kutana_start_meeting
tools.description: Start a meeting (transition from scheduled to active)

tools.name: kutana_end_meeting
tools.description: End a meeting (transition from active to completed)

tools.name: kutana_join_or_create_meeting
tools.description: Find an active meeting with the given title and join it, or create a new one

title.description: Meeting title to search for or create (max 200 chars)

capabilities.description: Agent capabilities: text_only (default), voice_in, voice_out, voice_bidirectional, tts_enabled

tools.name: kutana_subscribe_channel
tools.description: Subscribe to a data channel in the current meeting

channel.description: Channel name to subscribe to (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores; max 64 chars)

tools.name: kutana_publish_to_channel
tools.description: Publish a message to a data channel in the current meeting

tools.name: kutana_get_channel_messages
tools.description: Get buffered messages received on a data channel since subscribing

last_n.description: Maximum number of recent messages to return (default 50, max 500)

tools.name: kutana_get_meeting_events
tools.description: Get recent meeting events pushed by the gateway (turn changes, speaker transitions, joins/leaves, chat)

last_n.description: Maximum number of recent events to return (default 50, max 500)

event_type.description: Filter by event type: turn_queue_updated, turn_speaker_changed, turn_your_turn, participant_update, chat_message
